## CodeQL / Missing CSRF middleware

This cookie middleware is serving a [request handler](1) without CSRF protection.

## CodeQL / Clear text storage of sensitive information

This stores sensitive data returned by [a call to sign](1) as clear text.

[Show more details](https://github.com/aditisingh000/helping-hand/security/code-scanning/7)

## CodeQL / Missing rate limiting

This route handler performs [authorization](1), but is not rate-limited.
